00000006921559423598.title: Avery Water-Resistant Laser/Inkjet ID Labels on 4" x 6" Sheets, 1-1/4" x 3-1/2", Assorted Border Colors, 20 Labels/Pack (41413)

restrictionDetails.description: Out of stock for delivery to your shipping location.

paragraph: Designed to keep up with your organizational needs, Avery 41400 Durable ID Labels will stay on water bottles, plastic containers, school supplies and storage bins through the best and the worst moments. Created from tough materials made to stand up to daily use, these labels resist moisture, scuffing, tearing and smudging so that they can be used wherever you need them. These hardworking labels are also dishwasher-safe, microwave-safe and use a strong permanent adhesive to keep them adhered to metal, plastic, glass and more without lifting or falling off. Each label has a bright colored border that makes for easy referencing and color coding. Label on the spot by handwriting directly on the label (works best with permanent markers) or print easily using a laser or inkjet printer. You can even create your own custom labels using our easy-to-use templates and Avery Design & Print Online software. Try it out today!
bullets: Enjoy long-lasting organization with durable labels resist moisture, scuffing, tearing and smudging
Water-resistant, dishwasher-safe and microwave-safe, these small labels are perfect as water bottles labels, labels for food containers, lunchbox labels and more
Permanent adhesive sticks to a variety of surfaces including paper, glass, plastic and metal
Each label features a colorful preprinted border for easy identification and color coding
Personalize labels by hand or print easily with your laser or inkjet printer
Create custom labels using free Avery templates and the easy-to-use Avery Design & Print Online software
Great for bin labels, jars, plastic containers, name labels for kids school supplies and more

00000009370547925175.title: Brother TN-431 Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 3/Pack (TN4313PK)

paragraph: Delivering professional, vivid prints with 1800-page yield*, Brother TN-431 3PK genuine standard-yield color toner cartridges are intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with Brother printers for consistent results. Pack includes one each of cyan toner, yellow toner, and magenta toner.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L8260CDW, HL-L8360CDW, HL-L8360CDWMT, HL-L8360CDWT, MFC-L8610CDW, MFC-L8900CDW
Brother Genuine TN4313PK Standard-Yield 3 Pack Color Ink Cartridges – includes 1 Cyan, 1 Magenta and 1 Yellow Cartridge.
Page Yield of up to 1,800 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

paragraph: Designed to keep up with your organizational needs, Avery 41400 Durable ID Labels will stay on water bottles, plastic containers, school supplies and storage bins through the best and the worst moments. Created from tough materials made to stand up to daily use, these labels resist moisture, scuffing, tearing and smudging so that they can be used wherever you need them. These hardworking labels are also dishwasher-safe, microwave-safe and use a strong permanent adhesive to keep them adhered to metal, plastic, glass and more without lifting or falling off. Each label has a bright colored border that makes for easy referencing and color coding. Label on the spot by handwriting directly on the label (works best with permanent markers) or print easily using a laser or inkjet printer. You can even create your own custom labels using our easy-to-use templates and Avery Design & Print Online software. Try it out today!
bullets: Enjoy long-lasting organization with durable labels resist moisture, scuffing, tearing and smudging
Water-resistant, dishwasher-safe and microwave-safe, these small labels are perfect as water bottles labels, labels for food containers, lunchbox labels and more
Permanent adhesive sticks to a variety of surfaces including paper, glass, plastic and metal
Each label features a colorful preprinted border for easy identification and color coding
Personalize labels by hand or print easily with your laser or inkjet printer
Create custom labels using free Avery templates and the easy-to-use Avery Design & Print Online software
Great for bin labels, jars, plastic containers, name labels for kids school supplies and more
